name: one-darjeeling-root
description: Root configuration to manage backend and frontend dev servers

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && cd frontend && corepack yarn@1.22.22 install && cd .. && npm install --prefix frontend-admin
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "backend,frontend,admin" --prefix-colors "yellow,blue,magenta" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:admin"
